description: Style Note One casual garment that'll make you look sophisticated in an instant is this T-shirt from status quo. The quirky print on the chest renders a subtle charm to the tee, while the soft blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for a touch of style. Product Details Grey t-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves with graphic and flock print on the front Material and Care Blended fabric Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
